name: Finland
contextBlurb: Finland's housing-related portfolio sits under Sari Multala (Kokoomus), Minister of Climate and the Environment, who oversees building and environmental regulation. Coverage of Eduskunta housing legislation is thin in the current release. The tracker continues to monitor Finnish parliamentary activity for affordability and supply measures.

keyFigures.name: Sari Multala
keyFigures.role: Minister of Climate and the Environment
